name: Flat-Table Microwave 18L/23L Single-Function
pros: Flat table design eliminates rotating carousel — easier to fit rectangular containers
Large 18L/23L capacity suitable for meal prep and small households
Affordable entry price at under ¥11,000 with solid 4.33★ rating
cons: Single-function design lacks defrost presets or sensor cooking — less convenient than multi-function models
Brand has lower recognition among foreigners; limited English documentation available
shortDescription: Budget-friendly flat-table microwave with generous capacity for small homes.
review: A practical, no-frills microwave that prioritizes workspace over features. The flat table is genuinely useful in cramped Japanese kitchens. Solid build quality for the price, though you'll need to manually adjust power levels. Best for renters and minimalists who don't need smart features.
